text_fr: mité  de  la  frontière  entre  ce  p a ys  et  l a Thaïlande  a entretenu la tension dans la région,
text_en: the border between this country and Thailand has maintained tension in the region,

text_fr: Gravement troublée par le fait que la poursuite des combats  au  Kampuchea  et  l'instabilité  qui  persiste dans  ce  pays ont  obligé des  Kampuchéens,  en  quête de  nourriture  et  de  sécurité,  à  fuir  vers  l a frontière entre la Thailande et le Kampuche a ,
text_en: Gravely disturbed by the fact that the continuing fighting in Kampuchea and the ongoing instability in that country have forced Kampucheans, in search of food and security, to flee towards the border between Thailand and Kampuchea,

text_fr: Reconnaissant que  l' a ssist a nce  accordée  par  l a communauté  internationale a continué  d' a voir  pour effet  de  réduire  les  pénuries a limentaires  et  les  pro­ blèmes de santé dont souffre le peuple kampuchéen,
text_en: Recognising that the international community has continued to have the effect of reducing food shortages and health problems affecting the Kampuchean people,

text_fr: Soulignant que  les  Kampuchéens  qui  ont  cherché refuge  dans  des  p a ys  voisins  ont  le  droit  in a liénable de retourner en toute sécurité dans leur patrie,
text_en: Stressing that the Kampucheans who have sought refuge in neighbouring countries have the untenable right to return safely to their homeland,

text_fr: Soulignant  en  outre qu' a ucune  solution  effective des  problèmes  humanitaires  n'est  possible  sans  un règlement  politique d'ensemble du conflit kam­ puchéen,
text_en: Stressing further that an effective solution to humanitarian problems is not possible without an overall political solution to the Kampha conflict,

text_fr: Conw1incue que,  pour  inst a urer  une  p a ix  durable en Asie du  Sud-Est,  il  faut  trouver  d'urgence  une solution  politique  d'ensemble a u  problème  kampu­ chéen, qui assure le retrait de  toutes les forces étran­ gères  et  le  respect  de  la  souveraineté,  de  l'indépen­ dance, de l'intégrité territoriale,  de l a neutralité et du non-alignement du Kampuche a , a insi que  du  droit du peuple  kampuchéen à l'autodétermin a tion  à  l' a bri de toute ingérence extérieure,
text_en: In view of the urgent need to find a comprehensive political solution to the Kampuchea problem, which ensures the withdrawal of all foreign forces managed and respect for sovereignty, independence, territorial integrity, neutrality and non-alignment of Kampuchea, the right of the Kampuchean people to selfdetermination in the absence of any external interference,

text_fr: Conl'llincue  en  outre que,  après  le  règlement  poli­ tique  d'ensemble  de  la  question  kampuchéenne  par des moyens pacifiques, les pays de l a région de l'Asie du  Sud-Est pourront poursuivre les  efforts tendant à établir une zone de paix, de liberté et de  neutralité en Asie du  Sud-Est  afin  d'atténuer  les  tensions  intern a ­ tionales et d'instaurer une paix dur a ble dans la région,
text_en: Con cluded further that, following the comprehensive political settlement of the Kampuchean question by peaceful means, the countries of the South-East Asia region will be able to pursue efforts to establish a zone of peace, freedom and neutrality in South-East Asia in order to alleviate international tensions and to establish a firm peace in the region,

text_fr: Réajjirmant qu'il faut que tous les Et a ts  se  confor­ ment  strictement  aux  principes  de  la  Charte  des Nations  Unies,  qui  préconisent  le  respect  de  l'indé­ pendance n a tionale, de la souveraineté et de l'intégrité territoriale  de  tous  les  Et a ts,  l a non-intervention  et la non-ingérence  dans  les  affaires  intérieures  des Et a ts,  le non-recours à  la menace ou à l'emploi de  l a force et le règlement p a cifique des différends.
text_en: Reaffirming the need for all States to adhere strictly to the principles of the Charter of the United Nations, which call for respect for the national independence, sovereignty and territorial integrity of all States, non-intervention and non-interference in the internal affairs of the States, non-use of force or threat of force and the effective settlement of disputes.

items_en: 1. Reaffirms its resolutions 34/22, 35/6 and 36/5 and calls for their full implementation;

2. Errime of 110111·ea11 its co111·ictio11 that the withdrawal of all the forces from Kampuchea has , the restoration and preservation of the independence, sovereignty and territorial integrity of that country, the right of the Kampuchean people to decide their fate and the commitment of the people of Kampuchea not to interfere and not to interfere in the internal affairs of Kampuchea are the main factors in any just and hard settlement of the Kampuchean problem;
3. Takes note of the report of the Ad Hoc Committee of the International Conference on Kampuchea and calls for the continuation of the work of the Committee pending the reconvening of the Conference;
4. Authorizes the Special Committee to meet as necessary and to carry out the tasks entrusted to it in its m a nd a t;
5. Reciprocates its decision to reconvene the Conference in due course, in accordance with Resolution 1 (1) of the Conference;
6. Re110111·its call to all the States of South-East Asia and the other States concerned to attend future sessions of the Conference;
7. Requests the Conference to report to the General Assembly on the outcome of its future sessions;

8. Requests the Secretary-General to continue to hold consultations with and assist the Conference and the Special Committee in providing them, on a regular basis, with the necessary facilities for their discharge;

9. Prime to 11011th,111 its sati.1faction at the Secretary-General to see the appropriate measures taken closely following developments and requests him to continue to do so and to use his good offices to contribute to a comprehensive political settlement;

10. Erprime 1111e ji>i.1· still its pro}<mde satfas fi1ctio11 to donor countries, to the United Nations and its institutions, as well as to other national and international humanitarian organizations which have provided relief to the Kampuchean people, and has appealed to them to maintain the arrangements which have already been made to assist the Kampuchean people who are still in need, in particular those along the border between Thailand and Kampuchea and in reception centres in Thàland;
11. Dissatisfied with the efforts made by the General Secretariat to coordinate and monitor humanitarian assistance, and requested it to continue these efforts as long as it was necessary;

12. Requests the countries of South-East Asia, once a comprehensive political solution to the Kampuchea conflict has been reached, to devote further efforts to the establishment of a zone of peace. of freedom and neutrality in South-East Asia;

13. Erprime of 11011veau/'hope that after an overall political solution an intergovernmental committee will be set up to examine a programme of assistance to Kampuchea for the purpose of relèvement of the Kampuchean economy and the economic and social development of all the States of the region;
14. Requests the Secretary-General to report to the General Assembly at its thirty-eighth session on the implementation of the present resolution;
15. Decides to include in the provisional agenda of its thirty-eighth session the item entitled " Situation a u K a mpuche a".
